topics.title: Project Initiation and Project Foundations
topics.description: Learn how projects are initiated, justified and defined before detailed planning begins.

topics.title: Stakeholder Analysis and Engagement
topics.description: Identify project stakeholders, analyse their influence and interests, and develop suitable engagement strategies.

topics.title: Project Success and the Project Manager
topics.description: Examine project success criteria and the skills, behaviours and responsibilities associated with successful project managers.

topics.title: Project Scope and Work Breakdown
topics.description: Define project scope, establish deliverables and organise project work through a work breakdown structure.

topics.title: Time Planning and Project Scheduling
topics.description: Plan activities, identify dependencies, estimate durations and develop a realistic project schedule.

topics.title: Project Cost Planning and Control
topics.description: Estimate project costs, establish cost baselines and understand how project costs can be monitored and controlled.

topics.title: Project Crashing and Time–Cost Trade-offs
topics.description: Analyse how project duration can be reduced and evaluate the financial consequences of accelerating project activities.

topics.title: Procurement Planning and Supplier Selection
topics.description: Determine what a project should procure, plan the procurement process and evaluate potential suppliers.

topics.title: Contract Management in Supplier Relationships
topics.description: Understand contract formation, contractual responsibilities, performance monitoring, changes, claims and contract close-out.

topics.title: Buyer–Supplier Relationships and Project Follow-up
topics.description: Explore collaboration between buyers and suppliers and apply project planning, implementation and follow-up methods in practical cases.
